_comment: Intent classifier configuration. Phase 1 — runs in shadow mode by default. Activate via INTENT_CLASSIFIER_ENABLED=true.
_comment_threshold: confidence_threshold below which any LLM result is treated as AMBIGUOUS (fail-open). 0.85 means we require high confidence to leave the safety bucket.
_comment_security_keywords: Regex runs BEFORE the LLM. Any match here forces classification to security_critical and skips LLM entirely. Prevents prompt injection bypass (OWASP LLM01:2025) and replicates Issue #141 lessons (LLMs rephrased prompts and lost the security signal).

telemetry._comment_path: Telemetry log path is relative to current working directory at call time.
telemetry._comment_filename: Filename uses %Y-%m-%d format. One JSONL line per classification call.
